hero.title: Manage Your Inventions with Ease
hero.description: Inn2Market is connected to our secure Patent Disclosure Platform, where every inventor has a personal space to manage, visualize, and grow their portfolio. This platform also streamlines communication with the TTO, ensuring a smooth journey from idea to market.

platformFeatures.title: Platform Features
platformFeatures.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your inventions in one place

features.title: Personal Inventor Dashboard
features.description: Access your personalized dashboard to view all your inventions, track their status, and monitor progress through the patent process.

features.title: Portfolio Visualization
features.description: Visualize your invention portfolio with interactive charts and graphs that show the development timeline and market potential of each invention.

features.title: Secure Document Management
features.description: Store and organize all your invention-related documents securely in the cloud with version control and access tracking.

features.title: Direct TTO Communication
features.description: Communicate directly with our Technology Transfer Office through the platform, ensuring quick responses and streamlined support.

features.title: Market Analysis Tools
features.description: Access market research tools and industry insights to better understand the commercial potential of your inventions.

features.title: Collaboration Features
features.description: Collaborate with co-inventors, researchers, and industry partners through integrated communication and project management tools.

processSteps.title: How It Works
processSteps.subtitle: From idea submission to market success

steps.title: Submit Your Invention
steps.description: Upload your invention details, supporting documents, and preliminary research through our secure platform.

steps.title: Initial Review
steps.description: Our TTO team conducts an initial review to assess the invention's potential and patentability.

steps.title: Detailed Analysis
steps.description: Comprehensive analysis including prior art search, market assessment, and technical evaluation.

steps.title: Patent Application
steps.description: If approved, we guide you through the patent application process and handle all legal requirements.

steps.title: Commercialization
steps.description: We help you find licensing partners and commercialize your invention in the market.

benefits.title: Why Choose Our Platform
benefits.subtitle: Join thousands of inventors who trust our platform

benefits.title: Expert Guidance
benefits.description: Get expert guidance from our experienced TTO team throughout the entire patent process.

benefits.title: Cost-Effective
benefits.description: Reduce patent filing costs with our streamlined process and bulk filing capabilities.

benefits.title: Global Reach
benefits.description: Access international markets with our network of partners and global patent filing expertise.

benefits.title: 24/7 Support
benefits.description: Get round-the-clock support and assistance whenever you need help with your inventions.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Join our community of innovators and turn your ideas into market-ready inventions.
